subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Raqsha
subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned and hearkened unto the Call of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and who hath answered his Lord on this Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل و سمع ندآء الله المهیمن القیوم و اجاب مولیه فی یوم فیه
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
